title: Vangviang Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vangviang with a Z-Score of +3.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vangviang is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 69%, and the wind speed is 6.8 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense pressure due to this extreme weather condition.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
